title: Verify existing notification system implementation
description: All components specified in the task already exist and should be verified: src/models/notification.ts (types: info/warning/error, read/unread status), src/services/notifications.ts (NotificationService with CRUD + mark-as-read), src/routes/notifications.ts (GET/POST), src/app/api/notifications/[id]/read/route.ts (PATCH), src/utils/notificationHelpers.ts (formatting/filtering), and unit tests in notifications.test.ts and notificationHelpers.test.ts. Task is to verify the implementation is complete and working.
existing_patterns: src/models/notification.ts: NotificationSeverity type, Notification and NotificationFilter interfaces
src/services/notifications.ts: NotificationService class with Payload injection, CRUD operations (notify, getUnread, markRead, markAllRead)
src/routes/notifications.ts: Express-style route handlers with withAuth wrapper
src/app/api/notifications/[id]/read/route.ts: PATCH handler for individual notification mark-read
src/utils/notificationHelpers.ts: Utility functions (formatNotification, filterNotifications, getUnreadCount, sortBySeverity)
src/collections/Notifications.ts: Payload collection config with NotificationType
